items.front: What traffic action is taken for an overdue or unreported IFR aircraft if radar separation is not being used?
items.back: Restrict or suspend affected IFR traffic for 30 minutes after the applicable trigger time listed in the paragraph.

items.front: How long are airport lighting systems operated for an overdue or unreported aircraft?
items.back: From at least 30 minutes before the ETA until the aircraft is found or until 30 minutes after its fuel supply is estimated to be exhausted.

items.front: When may normal traffic resume after an overdue-aircraft traffic suspension?
items.back: After the 30-minute suspension has expired, if the operators or pilots of other aircraft concur, and that concurrence is maintained for 30 more minutes.

items.front: What is the first control action when two-way radio communications fail with an aircraft under your jurisdiction?
items.back: Use all appropriate available means to reestablish communications with the aircraft.
